title: Intermatic, R.C.
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Intermatic, R.C.''' was a shipping company that was in actuality a front for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Alpha Blue]] team. The "business" owned two private hangars located in Section 41 of [[Newport]]. The hangars served primarily as a location where the Alpha Blue Technical services could receive important shipments that needed to be kept confidential.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
